results.rendered_html: sautrāmaṇī f. a partic. sacrifice in honour of Indra (su-trāman; described as the 6th or 7th; of the 7 Havir-yajña-saṃsthās q.v.; in the  ŚBr.  it is said that every one consecrated by the Sautrāmaṇi enters among the gods and is born sarva-tanūḥ i.e. with his entire body; -tva n.,  ŚBr. ),  AV. ;  VS. ;  Br. ;  ŚrS. ;  BhP.
